overview: WeFlow is a project management app by nHive with a 4-step onboarding flow, Kanban board, sprint management, and team health metrics — all in an orange/amber themed interface.
features: Kanban board with To Do / Doing / Done / Blocked columns
Task cards with department tags, due dates, and assignees
Task detail modal with full editing
Left sidebar with sprint selector and task buckets
Right sidebar with team health metrics
Profile photo and workspace logo uploads
